title: ApplicationAttempt
description: Per-attempt outcome record written by the agent to data/applications/{draft_id}/attempts/{iso_ts}-{uuid8}.json at each playbook checkpoint. Files are byte-immutable after the first successful write; the reconciler writes NEW files that reference prior ones via `supersedes`.

batch_id.description: Either the batch ULID/timestamp format or `adhoc-<iso>-<uuid8>` for non-batch apply-posting invocations.

checkpoint.description: Must be a member of the playbook's declared checkpoint_sequence (enforced by record_attempt).

supersedes.description: Prior attempt filename when this record is a reconciliation entry. Non-null implies the original was an in_progress entry beyond the stale threshold.

error_code.description: Member of APPLICATION_ERROR_CODES when status=failed; otherwise null.
